title: Analytics - Location Permission Granted
scenario: Log user's location permission choice and verify Firebase event count increases after a few hours
steps: Open the app and trigger the location permission prompt.
Observe the user's choice (allow or deny).
Check Firebase Analytics for the event "location_permission_granted".
Wait a few hours for event counts to update.
Verify that the event count for related elements has increased.

Navigate to the Firebase page and confirm the following default elements are displayed: graph, events in the last 30 minutes, event count by country, event count by gender, events per session, app version, app build, and app environment.
expected: The event "location_permission_granted" is logged in Firebase, and after a few hours, the event count for related elements increases. The Firebase page displays all default elements: graph, events in the last 30 minutes, event count by country, event count by gender, events per session, app version, app build, and app environment.
